nodes.label: AI as research starting point
nodes.label_negative: Starting from blank page without AI
nodes.grounding_span: I'll use something like Chat GPT and type in relevant key words. That will then generate some information that I'll use as 'leads' to then delve further myself

nodes.label: AI as writing assistant for drafting
nodes.grounding_span: I wrote a rough outline quickly and gave the AI instructions to finesse it

nodes.label: AI delegation for simple tasks
nodes.grounding_span: I would like to integrate it even more into my work so it takes the bulk of 'routine' tasks away

nodes.label: AI understanding of complex nuanced tasks
nodes.label_negative: Human grasp of complex and nuanced information
nodes.grounding_span: the information I deal with tends to be very complex and nuanced and I think it would be challenging for an AI to grasp all the intracasies in a human like way

nodes.label: Efficiency and time savings
nodes.grounding_span: The whole approach saved a large amount of time with a professional sounding output

nodes.label: Human judgment and nuanced understanding
nodes.grounding_span: I think it would be challenging for an AI to grasp all the intracasies in a human like way

nodes.label: Satisfaction with AI for drafting
nodes.grounding_span: The whole approach saved a large amount of time with a professional sounding output, so that was a satisfying outcome

nodes.label: Confidence in human superiority for quality work
nodes.grounding_span: I'm not overly concerned personally as the information I deal with tends to be very complex and nuanced and I think it would be challenging for an AI to grasp all the intracasies in a human like way

nodes.label: Skepticism toward AI for complex tasks
nodes.grounding_span: I would like to integrate it even more into my work so it takes the bulk of 'routine' tasks away

nodes.label: Strategic task decomposition based on complexity
nodes.grounding_span: I'll use something like Chat GPT and type in relevant key words. That will then generate some information that I'll use as 'leads' to then delve further myself

nodes.label: Task-dependent collaboration style
nodes.grounding_span: With meeting notes, I will usually ask it to do the first summary and I'll then check and edit. When preparing a document I tend to be more collaborative
